title: Pan-Seared Squid with French Stir Fry
description: A simple and flavorful dish that combines the tender squid with a savory French-inspired stir fry.

ingredients.name: Squid
ingredients.notes: cleaned and cut into bite-sized pieces

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the squid and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, until browned and cooked through.
Remove the squid from the skillet and set aside.
In the same skillet, add the garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the leeks and fennel to the skillet and cook for 3-4 minutes, until tender.
Add the white wine to the skillet and cook for 1-2 minutes, until the liquid has almost completely evaporated.
Add the butter to the skillet and stir until melted.
Return the squid to the skillet and toss with the sauce.
